title: Parse a framed sensor packet safely
instruction: Fix parse_packet so it validates a 4-byte embedded-style packet: byte 0 must be 0xAA, byte 3 must equal the low 8 bits of byte1 + byte2, and the parsed output should combine byte1 and byte2 into a 16-bit big-endian value. Invalid input must return -1.
difficulty_rationale: Embedded-style C state and boundary handling with hidden safety tests.
